qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: ImportFE upload filename traversal permits arbitrary file write and authenticated RCE
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets the ImportFE upload path in `plugins/importFE`, not the advisory's SQL query concatenation in `templates/scadenzario/init.php` for `/pdfgen.php?ptype=scadenzario`.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: ReceiptFE upload filename traversal permits arbitrary file write and authenticated RCE
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets the ReceiptFE upload path in `plugins/receiptFE`, not the advisory's Scadenzario print-template SQL injection on `id_anagrafica`.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: User-bound shared-access token bypasses record scoping and exposes arbitrary module records
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a token-backed record-scope authorization flaw in `token_login.php`, `editor.php`, and `src/Permissions.php`, not SQL injection in the Scadenzario template query builder.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: None of the qualifying findings identify the advisory-described root cause: authenticated SQL injection in `templates/scadenzario/init.php` where `id_anagrafica` is concatenated into the Scadenzario print-template query used by `/pdfgen.php?ptype=scadenzario`.
evidence: The advisory is specific to SQL query construction in `templates/scadenzario/init.php` for the Scadenzario print template and names the unsanitized `id_anagrafica` parameter as the root cause.
The `qualifying_importfe_filename_traversal_rce` finding instead describes multipart filename traversal and file write in the ImportFE plugin upload flow.
The `qualifying_receiptfe_filename_traversal_rce` finding instead describes multipart filename traversal and file write in the ReceiptFE plugin upload flow.
The `qualifying_token_record_scope_bypass` finding instead describes record-scope enforcement failure after token login in `token_login.php`, `editor.php`, and `src/Permissions.php`.
